bedroom.name: Cozy bedroom
bedroom.description: Soft morning light filters through the curtains onto a neatly made bed.

hallway.name: Narrow Hallway
hallway.description: Framed photos line the walls of a dimly lit hallway that creaks underfoot.

kitchen.name: Small Kitchen
kitchen.description: The smell of fresh coffee lingers in the air beside a cluttered countertop.

locked_gate.name: Garden Gate
locked_gate.description: A heavy iron gate leading to the garden. It requires a keycard.

keycard.name: Keycard
keycard.description: A plastic card with a magnetic strip.

safe.name: Steel Safe
safe.description: A small digital safe tucked under the counter. It's locked.

secret_note.name: Secret Note
secret_note.description: It says: 'The treasure is under the garden tree.'
